title: Packit: re-enable ELN and CentOS Stream jobs on PRs
body: See individual commits. These only relate to PR jobs. Downstream jobs not affected.

comments.body: @mtrmac I enabled centos stream jobs in this PR in addition to the commit from #2690 (I'll close that one).
@lsm5 regarding the CentOS - packit always need to reference an approved JIRA or MRs created by it are unmergeable.

> @lsm5 regarding the CentOS - packit always need to reference an approved JIRA or MRs created by it are unmergeable.

Yup, this is only for copr builds on PRs and the subsequent testing-farm tests. The `propose_downstream` job for centos-stream is still set to ignore. I'll update the PR description.
